List available Quarto and R templates

Source: R/templates.R
eri_template_list.Rd

Returns a tibble combining bundled package templates (always available offline) with any custom templates registered in the Azure templates/ directory. Falls back to bundled-only if no Azure connection is available.

Usage

eri_template_list(data_con = NULL)

Arguments

data_con

Azure container object for the data/ blob. If NULL, connects automatically. Pass NA to skip Azure and return bundled templates only.

Value

A tibble with columns: name, description, source ("bundled" or "azure"), filename.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
eri_template_list()

# Bundled only (no Azure connection needed)
eri_template_list(data_con = NA)
} # }
